user.title: SolarIndex Setup
user.description: Connect SolarIndex to your solar energy sensor and choose a location for weather forecasts.

data_description.solar_sensor: Select the sensor that tracks your total solar energy production (kWh). This is used for automatic model training.
data_description.city: Enter a city name to search for your location.

pick_location.title: Choose Location
pick_location.description: Multiple locations were found. Please select the correct one.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Fine-tune the temperature compensation for your solar panels. The defaults work well for most installations.

data.cell_temp_offset: Cell temperature offset (°C above air temp)

data_description.temp_coefficient: Efficiency loss per degree Celsius above 25°C (STC). Typical value: 0.004 (0.4%).
data_description.cell_temp_offset: Estimated cell temperature above air temperature. Typical value: 10°C.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Open-Meteo API. Please check your internet connection.
error.city_not_found: No location found for this city name. Please try a different search term.
error.no_energy_sensors: No energy sensors found in Home Assistant. Please add a solar energy sensor first.

abort.already_configured: SolarIndex is already configured for this location.

data.cell_temp_offset: Cell temperature offset (°C above air temp)
